title: Sumana Sahoo - CV

content: Sumana Sahoo PhD Student | Remote Sensing & Geospatial Data Scientist Department of Natural Resources and Environment, University of Alaska Fairbanks 📧 Email | 🐙 GitHub | 🔗 LinkedIn 🎓 Education Doctoral in Natural Resources and Sustainability University of Alaska Fairbanks | 2022–Present Advisor: Dr. Santosh Panda Masters in Remote Sensing & GIS (Geoinformatics) Indian Institute of Remote Sensing (IIRS), Dehradun | 2017–2019 Advisor: Prasun Kumar Gupta Bachelors in Civil Engineering Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Pune | 2012–2016 💼 Employment History Summer Intern | Alaska Satellite Facility | May 2023 – Aug 2023 Analyzed SAR data for forest ecosystem monitoring using OpenSAR Lab. Geospatial Data Scientist | Blue Sky Analytics | Jul 2020 – Mar 2021 Developed datasets for environmental monitoring and climate prediction. Junior Research Fellow | Indian Institute of Technology (IIT), Kharagpur | Jul 2019 – Jul 2020 Researched climate change impacts on water fluxes using the JULES model. 🔬 Research & Projects Doctoral Research Boreal Dynamics: Investigating forest health and vegetation dynamics in Alaska using multi-source satellite observations. Disturbance Monitoring: Developing models for early detection and monitoring of Aspen Leaf Miner defoliation using remote sensing.
